Market Intelligence Brief
Generated 15:03 ET
Massive dispersion play unfolds as institutions hedge index exposure while loading single-name calls
KEY TAKEAWAYS
  • 1. Institutional dispersion hedge in motion: index P/C at 2.02 (put-heavy) while single-name P/C at 0.77 (call-heavy) — classic portfolio protection structure ahead of CPI.
  • 2. Energy sector positioning screams defensive: XLE block puts totaling 90,000 contracts at multiple strikes while XLE shows vol-high/skew-flat divergence.
  • 3. Positive dealer gamma at $7.8B creates vol suppression backdrop that amplifies tomorrow's CPI reaction potential.
NARRATIVE — dispersion hedge mode

The most striking signal today is the extreme P/C divergence — institutions are aggressively hedging broad exposure with index puts (2.02 ratio) while simultaneously loading single-name calls (0.77 ratio), a textbook dispersion play ahead of tomorrow's CPI print. This structure suggests sophisticated money expects stock-specific outperformance within a hedged portfolio framework, supported by implied correlation at just 0.12 indicating maximum stock-specific opportunity. Energy positioning reveals institutional defensiveness despite sector strength, with massive XLE put blocks totaling 90,000 contracts across Sep 18 strikes (52.5P, 57.5P) while XLE trades in vol-high/skew-flat divergence. The combination of record put demand and muted skew pricing suggests either informed positioning ahead of oil inventory data or systematic rebalancing, particularly noteworthy given XLE's recent golden cross technical signal. Dealer positioning at +$7.8B positive gamma creates a vol suppression environment that could amplify tomorrow's CPI reaction in either direction. With VIX at 21.8 and 10 names in backwardation (AAPL, AMZN, META among them), the market has priced elevated near-term event risk while dealer hedging artificially dampens intraday moves — a setup for explosive post-CPI volatility expansion.

Layer 1: Sentiment +38Layer 2: GEX +$7.8BLayer 3: P/C divergence 2.02/0.77Layer 4: IC 0.12Layer 9: CPI tomorrow

GREEK PRESSURE KEY
+$M = dealer buys to re-hedge
−$M = dealer sells to re-hedge
Charm: time-decay drift only. Vanna: vol-shift only. Not blended.
